entry.title: IDC VA797H17D0024 (P00019) awarded to GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MODIFICATION P00018 TO INCORPORATE REVISIONS TO THE OFFERED SERVICE MAINTENANCE CONTRACT ITEMS.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IMAGING EQUIPMENT AND SUPPLIES: MEDICAL, DENTAL, VETERINARY

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
